shell.signinTitle: sign in to your partner dashboard
shell.signinBody: this area is for Demat partner shops — sign in to continue.
shell.notPartnerTitle: this area is for Demat partners
shell.notPartnerBody: your account isn't linked to a partner shop. if you think it should be, drop us a line and we'll sort it out.

common.error: something went wrong — please try again

fees.waived: fees waived during the pilot — the full amount is transferred to you

overview.connectTitle: payouts aren't fully set up yet
overview.connectBody: finish your Stripe setup so sales and rentals can be paid out to you.

notifications.title: notifications
notifications.empty: nothing here yet — new reservations and updates will show up here.

items.title: your items
items.emptyAllBody: list your first item and we'll review it before it goes live.
items.emptyFilterBody: no items with this status right now.

item.readOnly: this item is {status} — it can't be edited right now.
item.rejectedHint: make the changes below and resubmit it for approval.
item.rentalDepositHint: held on the renter's card while the item is out — released on a good return.
item.holdHint: up to {amount} for this item — 20% of the price, capped at €25.
item.holdHintNoPrice: set a price first and we'll show the maximum hold.
item.errCapability: pick at least one: for sale or for rent
item.errPurchasePrice: add a purchase price to sell this item
item.errRentalPrice: add a rental price to rent this item out
item.errWeeks: rental weeks must be between 2 and 4
item.errDepositExceeds: the rental deposit can't be more than the purchase price
item.errCap: that hold is over the cap for this item — the maximum is {amount}
item.photosSaveFirst: save the item first — then you can add photos here.
item.photoError: we couldn't update the photos — please try again
item.submitConfirmBody: we'll review the item before it goes live. a €0,70 processing fee (plus btw) applies per submitted item.

reservations.title: reservations
reservations.emptyBody: when a customer reserves one of your items, it shows up here.
reservations.noShowTooltip: available once the reserve window has ended
reservations.priceNote: the charged price is decided automatically: members pay the member price, based on their membership when they reserved.
reservations.declineBody: no charge — the customer tried it on and it wasn't a match. all good.
reservations.noShowBody: the customer never showed up — this captures the {amount} hold from their card and puts the item back up.
reservations.noShowBodyNoHold: there's no hold on this reservation — the item simply goes back up for grabs.

rentals.title: rentals
rentals.emptyBody: items you rent out show up here with their return dates.
rentals.returnOkNote: the {amount} deposit is released back to the customer and the item goes back up.
rentals.returnOkNoteNoDeposit: no deposit to release — the item goes straight back up.
rentals.returnDamagedNote: the deposit stays held while you sort out the damage — charge it from the rental card afterwards.
rentals.damageWriteOff: item is beyond repair — retire it
rentals.damageWrittenOff: the item has been retired — it won't be listed again.
rentals.rtoExplain: the renter buys this item — rent they've already paid comes off the price.
rentals.rtoPriceNote: the charged price follows the customer's original reservation: members pay the member price, based on their membership when they reserved.
rentals.rtoNote: the exact credit is worked out from everything they've paid in rent on this item — you'll see the final numbers right after.

terms.title: terms & conditions
terms.intro: customers accept your terms when they reserve. publishing a new version only applies to new reservations — it never changes what existing customers agreed to.
terms.noneYet: no versions yet — publish your first below.
terms.pdfBadType: the attachment must be a pdf
terms.needBodyOrPdf: add the terms text or attach a pdf
terms.published: new version published — it applies to new reservations from now on.

storefront.title: your storefront
storefront.discountNote: set by Demat — members automatically get {pct}% off in your shop.
storefront.photosHint: shown on your public shop page — a warm storefront photo works wonders.
storefront.photoError: we couldn't update the photos — please try again

payouts.title: payouts
payouts.explainer: payouts run through Stripe Express: customers pay Stripe, and Stripe pays your own account directly — Demat never holds your money.
payouts.noAccountYet: your Stripe account hasn't been created yet — ask us to enable payouts and we'll set it up together.
